lint.output: 1 pre-existing warning in flow-canvas.tsx (unused import) — known acceptable per LEARNINGS.md. No new warnings.

notes: Migration 022 creates improvement_status enum (proposed/approved/in_progress/completed/rejected) and improvement_priority enum (low/medium/high/critical) + improvement_ideas table with all required columns. Reuses update_updated_at() trigger from migration 015. All linked_*_id FKs use ON DELETE SET NULL. RLS: SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE using can_access_workspace(workspace_id). GET route supports optional status/priority query filter params, ordered created_at desc. POST validates workspace_id required, title non-empty, optional enum validation for status/priority. PATCH uses EDITABLE_FIELDS pattern with enum validation. DELETE uses .select().single() for 0-row detection. All mutations call void logActivity(). Client wrappers: fetchImprovementIdeas (with filters), createImprovementIdea, updateImprovementIdea, deleteImprovementIdea — all following coloring-rules pattern.
